incidents.Description: Rep found in ICU without valid access authorization or escort. Badge had expired 2 weeks prior.
incidents.Investigation Notes: Rep claims badge renewal was pending. Security footage confirms unescorted entry at 14:23.
incidents.Corrective Action: Access denied pending full re-credentialing. Vendor notified.

incidents.Description: Rep discovered with expired HIPAA training and drug screen during routine check.
incidents.Investigation Notes: Vendor HR confirmed credentials lapsed. Rep suspended from facility.
incidents.Corrective Action: Rep must complete all required training before reinstatement.

incidents.Description: Rep entered sterile field without proper gowning during robotic surgery case.
incidents.Investigation Notes: Circulating nurse witnessed the breach. Case was not contaminated but protocol requires full investigation.

incidents.Description: Service tech failed to follow hand hygiene protocol between patient rooms during equipment maintenance.
incidents.Investigation Notes: Observed by IC rounding nurse. Tech admitted to skipping hand hygiene step.
incidents.Corrective Action: Mandatory IC re-training scheduled. 30-day supervised access only.

incidents.Description: Rep allowed another vendor representative to use their badge to enter surgical suite.
incidents.Investigation Notes: Security camera confirmed badge sharing at 10:15 AM.
incidents.Corrective Action: Both reps counseled. Badge sharing added to vendor orientation materials.
